name: qa-command-center-plugin
description: QA Command Center Claude Code assets: agents, commands, skills, hooks, and MCP config for structured QA workflows and flaky test detection.
install: Copy the contents of this plugin/ directory into your project's .claude/ directory (agents/, commands/, skills/, hooks/). Merge the hooks section from mcp/settings-hooks.json into your .claude/settings.json. Add DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_FLAKY_CHANNEL_ID to your .env file.
